description: Browse the archive of news and announcements from the U.S. Naval Academy for the year 2022. Find stories on events, academics, and midshipmen.
text:
Holiday Gate Hours
ANNAPOLIS, Md. – U.S. Naval Academy Gate 1 will operate under the following modified hours during the holiday season, Dec. 21 – Jan. 8, 2022. All are welcome to attend Christmas services in the Chapel Dec. 24 and Dec. 25. Gate ...

NAVAL ACADEMY BREAKS GROUND ON SEA WALL PROJECT
A small ceremony was held Nov. 22, 2022, along the Farragut Field Sea Wall at the United States Naval Academy, breaking ground on the first project to protect against future sea level rise. The project aims to repair and raise the ...

ANNAPOLIS, Md. – More than 1,000 midshipmen in the Class of 2023 received their service assignments yesterday in Bancroft Hall at the United States Naval Academy. Midshipmen may select from 24 different career choices in the U.S. Navy ...
